items.summary: In the WhatsAppButton component (frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.tsx), update the href/link URL to 'https://wa.me/918429145707?text=Hi%20MEDANTA%20CARE%2C%20I%20want%20to%20place%20an%20order' so that clicking the floating WhatsApp SVG icon (identified at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/a[1]/svg[1]) redirects to the correct WhatsApp number +91 8429145707.
